Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Continued To Feb-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Andrew B. Still; Snell & Wilmer LLP; 714-427-7000; appearing on behalf of defendant PS Funding, Inc.
Jennifer K. Stinnett; Christensen Hsu Sipes LLP; 916-443-6909; appearing on behalf of plaintiff Presidio Collins Partners, LLC.

Defendant PS Funding, Inc. contests the portion of the court's tentative ruling granting plaintiff leave to amend. Plaintiff's counsel requests 20 days leave to amend. Defendant does not object to plaintiff's request. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PS FUNDING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts support allegations re: duty to disclose and that the moving defendant "spoke on the subject with Plaintiff" (opposition 5:18). Plaintiff shall have 20 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. All amendments must be in bold font.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
